benefits.description: Got a ton of energy even at the lowest dose of 0.2mg; eventually titrated up to 0.5mg for most of the protocol, approaching 1mg

side_effects.description: Effects diminished over time; peptide eventually stopped doing much, attributed to mitochondrial repair being complete

protocol_notes: User titrated from 0.2mg up to ~0.5mg (primary dose) and near 1mg. After a few months break, energy-boosting effects returned. Advises others not to go up to 2.5mg and to stick with what works.
